hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams unify originator and beneficiary data with Travel Rule message tracking, exception handling, case linkage and audit evidence in one operational system.

problem_title: Travel Rule data remains disconnected and incomplete
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear and consistent view of originator and beneficiary data as it flows through multiple Travel Rule providers. This fragmentation slows case management, limits traceability, and weakens audit readiness across jurisdictional workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates originator and beneficiary details from multiple Travel Rule providers into a unified workflow that supports case management, exception tracking, audit evidence preservation and jurisdictional compliance operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes Travel Rule originator and beneficiary data through message routing, exception handling, case creation, evidence preservation and compliance reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Evidence-ready Travel Rule workflows

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects Travel Rule messages, party data, exceptions, cases, and audit evidence within one structured workflow for VASPs and digital asset firms.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage originator and beneficiary data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates originator and beneficiary information from multiple providers, applies internal policies, tracks message completeness, and creates cases for review or escalation when exceptions occur.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, message statuses and supporting evidence as part of audit-ready records to support regulatory reviews and operational traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule messaging providers, orchestrating their outputs without replacing them and providing a connected workflow above existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule messaging providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule messaging providers but connects their outputs into one structured compliance workflow with routing, case management and evidence preservation.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule data into compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links originator and beneficiary data with exceptions, cases and audit evidence for controlled compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
